column1: # Maplify provenance census — Phase 11 / plan 11-02 (RESOLVE-02/03, D-08)
# Date: 2026-06-19  |  Status: HUMAN-CONFIRMED (Task 2 sign-off, operator approved)
# Source: PROD (project ref grztmjpzamcxlzecmqca) via IPv4 pooler aws-1-us-west-1.pooler.supabase.com:5432, session mode
#   (direct host db.<ref>.supabase.co is IPv6-only — no route from this host; pooler used instead)
# READ-ONLY guarantee: a single SELECT, no data mutation. maplify.sightings.comments NOT mutated (SC#2).
# Total maplify.sightings rows at census time: 6832 (cf. EXEC-SUMMARY §3 ~6827 — minor expected drift).
# Precedence note (CONFIRMED intended): each row assigned to its HIGHEST-PRECEDENCE signal
#   (bracket -> attribution -> source-only), matching the locked resolution order. A row tagged
#   "[Orca Network] ... Submitted by a Cascadia Trusted Observer" resolves via bracket 'Orca Network',
#   NOT attribution 'Cascadia'. This is why attribution counts here are lower than EXEC-SUMMARY §3.
#   - All bracket + attribution values map to EXISTING Phase-9 collection slugs (deterministic).
#   - source 'whale_alert' (2484) -> NEW collection slug 'whale-alert' (name "Whale Alert", parent org Whale Alert)
#     to be SEEDED in plan 11-03, distinct from whale-alert-global / whale-alert-alaska channels.
#   - source 'wras' (50) -> DROP. These records should not exist. Plan 11-04 adds (a) a one-time guarded
#     DELETE of existing source='wras' rows, and (b) a `WHERE source IS DISTINCT FROM 'wras'` filter in
#     maplify.update_sightings so they are dropped on ingestion going forward. (operator, 2026-06-19)
#   - Empty / [NULL] brackets: none present in census (regex ^\[[^\]]+\] requires >=1 char). D-09 satisfied.
#   - Acronym real-name expansions (PSWS/MCW/CWW/WSSJI/HIWS/SBW/WA/PSWW/SA/SSCH) NOT yet known — slug mapping
#     is sufficient for backfill; collection.name backfill for these stubs is DEFERRED (optional D-10 UPDATE skipped).
#                 WHEN comments ~ 'Trusted Observer' THEN 'attribution' ELSE 'source-only' END AS match_kind,
#                 WHEN comments ~ 'Trusted Observer' THEN regexp_replace(comments,'.*Submitted by an? (.+) Trusted Observer.*','\1','g')
#     FROM maplify.sightings) t GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1, 3 DESC;
# target_collection_slug: HUMAN-CONFIRMED. 'STAY_NULL' = intentionally unresolved. '* (NEW)' = seed in 11-03.
